channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: She Waited Decades for Scotland to Make the World Cup. At 93, She Will Cheer in Person
item.description: Moira Brown, possibly the oldest member of Scotland's Tartan Army, will attend the match in Boston when Scotland faces Haiti on June 13. "I'm ...

item.title: Which Billionaire Said They Learned a 'Significant Lesson' This Week? The Quiz Knows
item.description: This week, Knicks fans experienced a big win after a big loss; inflation fans were delighted, and World Cup fans went broke. How will quiz fans fare?

item.title: How small-business loans became entangled in Trump's immigration policy
item.description: For decades, legal permanent residents could obtain SBA loans, a key support for small businesses.

item.title: A guide to the 26 players on the U.S. World Cup roster
item.description: The U.S. opens its 2026 World Cup on Friday against Paraguay. For the 26 Americans, this match is the peak of years of effort.
